description: Classification for harness-update. Files under governance_roots default to the overwrite set (applied directly from the new harness version) unless listed in merge_set (three-way merged: base = anchored harness version, ours = project file, theirs = new harness version) or exclude (never updated; setup-only machinery eject removes). out_of_scope documents paths the coverage check accepts without classification: generated mirrors and the downstream-only anchor. Everything outside governance_roots is project-owned and untouched. See docs/adr/adr-setup-add-harness-update-mechanism.md.
